text: Technically, if that did over 244 damage (24,400 in my visualization), then Sonic shouldn't have survived with the "Standard" Morale status buff taken from Epic Battle Fantasy 4 (leaves affected alive with 1 HP if hit with a powerful attack from above 50% HP). text:
that's because of his Guts stat.
if your Guts stat is high enough in Earthbound, then you have a chance of taking mortal damage but still have one HP remaining.
the Guts stat also determines how often you SMAAAASH, and how fast your HP numbers roll.

author: @Spekkof

text:
You can stock up on cheeseburgers before the fight, but it's a 1 in 64 drop, so it's not recommended for a speedrun.

Also, once you take "fatal" damage you have to start praying in order to win.  If you want to stock up on healing items for this phase, I'd recommend chili dogs since you can buy them.  Just make sure you can reach Piyngas with at least three, as Tachin got lucky in this video and survived with just two healing items.
author: @RaceBandit

text: NEDM beats all!!! except for waddle dee and chuck norris
author: @gamerguy980

text: Sorry, did I go overkill there?
author: @RaceBandit

text:
I found this out the hard way by spamming Mind Rape, and even though I ended up doing a total of 103572 damage, Piyngas was still alive. I figured that with Scout and Heavy using healing items whenever necessary, I could keep Sonic and Leonidas alive long enough to deal fatal damage without prayers.

I did, however, find out that you can get an extra prayer per turn if you manage to get Peach in your party, but it's not recommended for a speedrun as Bowser and Airman are stupidly hard to beat.
